name: Team Raffensperger
subject: Reminder: Georgia’s Primary Election is this Tuesday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRAD FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
This election is going to come down to turnout.

| | | | | [|
---](https://BradForGeorgia.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb0b5d8f4cac8238170f7992f&id=785f4d2453&e=6036811227)
| |

Friends,
This is a reminder that Georgia’s Primary Election will be held this Tuesday, May 19.
This election is going to come down to turnout, and every last vote counts. Please share this email with friends, family, and coworkers and tell them to make their voices heard.
On Tuesday, voters may cast ballots at their assigned polling location. All Georgia polling locations will be open from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM.
You can find your polling location and precinct here: [https://mvp.sos.ga.gov/s/](https://BradForGeorgia.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb0b5d8f4cac8238170f7992f&id=096fb02dfd&e=6036811227)
While Burt Jones and Rick Jackson continue spending millions attacking each other, Brad remains focused on the issues that matter most to hardworking Georgia families.
Brad is a man of faith, a proven job creator, and a conservative leader who stands on principle and puts Georgia first. As others engage in negativity and political theater, Brad continues traveling the state, listening to voters, and talking about real conservative solutions to make Georgia more affordable and safe.
Brad’s plan includes:
* Capping skyrocketing property taxes and eliminating non-essential property taxes for seniors
* Ending the state income tax on retirement benefits
* Creating great-paying jobs through re-shoring
* Fully funding state and local law enforcement
* Doubling school safety grants, including for private schools

A newly released poll conducted by Republican pollster Echelon Insights also shows Brad is the strongest Republican candidate to defeat Keisha Lance Bottoms in November.
As Democrats prepare to spend millions trying to flip Georgia blue, Republicans need a nominee with a proven ability to unite voters and win statewide.
Please make a plan to vote on Tuesday, May 19 — and encourage your friends, family, and neighbors to do the same.
Thank you for your support, and Go Brad!Team Raffensperger
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://BradForGeorgia.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb0b5d8f4cac8238170f7992f&id=106e13ed0a&e=6036811227)
---

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Trump wants to end mail-in voting forever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Trump’s order is the culmination of years of attacks on absentee ballots and vote-by-mail. In the months before the 2020 election, Trump repeatedly spread disinformation and conspiracy theories about the legitimacy of mail-in ballots as he campaigned for reelection. With MAGA angling for total control, Trump wants to end their use forever.
Fuel our work with $35 or more right now to help defend the use of mail-in ballots across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=051726_3&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: With New Order, Trump Tries to Kill Off Vote By Mail [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=051726_3&amount=25]
We're going to keep hammering this home, Team, because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever.
President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail .
For background: After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day.
So of course, this order directs the Attorney General to “ take all necessary action ” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day.
This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast.
We've got to keep fighting and work to protect our elections and our fundamental right to vote. Step up with $35 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=051726_3&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=051726_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=051726_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=051726_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=051726_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=051726_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=051726_3&amount=35]
We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail.
Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure , mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.
Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ”
Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $35 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=051726_3&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051726_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051726_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=WYS8TRlGkgg6Maw13vt84%2Fq75I%2Fh4JvskKvAqT6yKUlIXbSa0BL%2B852j1idS3luJCgNbRbMYjIj8Hi8HR33EgljUk78knbV%2FSKCCZmeCG4I7qcLZpWLwWpX%2By%2F0QDnTVMq%2B5JutmcktB7GMhAtp%2F%2F97CQxxxEPv78tzAzCIsXWZhdO%2F%2BbtkZbHEGTYYWuS6nGLleSj8yxYK5%2BMW%2FjZOsdKjKZoNdXZviLIZyCypKoDh%2BV%2FAKAOS%2FwnkWXqndGKS0DIofzxuhG%2Fy%2FhIBOLkLNn8GrysE1hlygAof2J%2Fh38nVDL4NkbrJPkrXtQ578G7UVOz8LMliZt4C%2Bja%2FRzwaWEx6R5Tmvu0hLOSyOHOYTvZkRyr4WkBMjIuTmFYP8iWN06c2DaZfBd4sqGGpdvb8fhMf9lD4wj9qPmMdLWqR8zFg%3D .

name: Zach with Team Jena
subject: We can’t risk losing the AG Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg? [secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg?]
Hi Peter,
I wanted to share a quick update.
After checking in with the finance team, we’ve set a $15,000 fundraising goal for the rest of May to help keep building a strong campaign for Attorney General. If you can, chip in today to help us reach it. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg?]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg?]This race is too important to leave to chance, especially with a conservative dark money group targeting us.
Jena Griswold has spent the last seven years leading the Colorado Secretary of State’s Office through some big fights to protect our democracy — from taking on MAGA’s efforts to undermine the 2020 election to removing Tina Peters from directly overseeing Mesa County elections after her misconduct.
Jena’s in the best position to keep the AG’s office blue. She’s also the only candidate in this race who has won statewide — twice.
At a moment when Trump and MAGA extremists continue attacking our rights and democracy, Colorado needs proven leadership in the Attorney General’s office. Jena knows how to lead and how to win.
Can you chip in today to help Team Jena build the strong campaign it will take to win? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-jg?]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Update: Bernie backs JD candidate Dr. Adam Hamawy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we have
exciting news:

In one of the most crowded Democratic primaries in the country, Sen.
Bernie Sanders just endorsed Justice Democrats candidate Dr. Adam Hamawy
for NJ-12!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260517-ah.q0uL4e&refcode=em20260517-37789&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37789%2E1203867%2EB31WJu ]Tweet from Bernie Sanders: Adam Hamawy was a 9/11 first responder, a
combat trauma surgeon in Iraq and a volunteer in hospitals under
bombardment in Gaza. He understands firsthand that our current healthcare
system is broken and that we must pass Medicare for All. I am proud to
endorse him.

Following in Bernie’s footsteps, Dr. Hamawy is running for Congress to
fight for Medicare for All, end forever wars, and stop politicians from
putting corporate profits ahead of human lives.

After witnessing the genocide in Gaza firsthand, Dr. Hamawy came home
determined to speak out against endless war and the use of our tax dollars
to fund atrocities abroad, while families here struggle to afford health
care and basic necessities.

That’s why Bernie and Justice Democrats stand with Dr. Adam Hamawy —
because we know the status quo, establishment politics won’t meet this
moment.

We need leaders willing to fight for healthcare as a human right, take on
billionaire influence in politics, and deliver a government that works for
everyday people.

People are responding to the kind of change that Dr. Hamway represents.
Despite refusing corporate PAC money, he’s already outraised establishment
and AIPAC-backed opponents, with grassroots supporters like you powering
this campaign.

Now with Bernie’s endorsement, we need to build on this momentum and
finish strong in the primary, which is less than three weeks away.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260517-ah.q0uL4e&refcode=em20260517-37789&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37789%2E1203867%2EB31WJu ]Can you split a contribution today between Justice Democrats and Dr.
Adam Hamawy to help power his movement forward and send a real progressive
fighter to Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260517-ah.q0uL4e&refcode=em20260517-37789&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=10&t=1022&akid=37789%2E1203867%2EB31WJu ]Contribute $10

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260517-37789-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37789_1203867_B31WJu&akid=37789%2E1203867%2EB31WJu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37789%2E1203867%2EB31WJu

1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603

body:

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.

# [He Voted to Control Your Family. ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=7534176&post_id=198196051&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MTk2MDUxLCJpYXQiOjE3NzkwNjU1NzQsImV4cCI6MTc4MTY1NzU3NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTc1MzQxNzYiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.E1WbTwX2R6tO_3VXKEeuk5w3GUcTo8RuEsHVBAl3lyo)
### Same story, same fight, different face.
| | [Mike Cortese](https://substack.com/@mikefortennessee)
---
| May 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikefortennessee)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=7534176&post_id=198196051&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk4MTk2MDUxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3OTA2NTU3NCwiZXhwIjoxNzgxNjU3NTc0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNzUzNDE3NiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wwfW8GFBBT6eGkWzD0NaReXY-7TU2BmZgcDmOPNg1Uk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbWlrZWZvcnRlbm5lc3NlZS9wL2hlLXZvdGVkLXRvLWNvbnRyb2wteW91ci1mYW1pbHk_.xPHSOduc3_hTt2NgLKXHiiy5cqhEqfQN8tTjRXKXFsA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mikefortennessee/p/he-voted-to-control-your-family?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

My wife and I have lived through seven miscarriages. One of them came just months after the Dobbs decision. We were sitting in a doctor's office for a 10-week ultrasound when the doctor told us the fetus was forming without a head, there was no heartbeat, _and could only help**because** there was no heartbeat._
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d38716c6-1377-49d1-922c-d2f9bdadc531?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Some of you have followed this fight since I ran against Andy Ogles. The lines have changed, redistricting put us in a new district, but the fight hasn't. Different name on the door, same broken ideology inside. Now I'm running against Scott DesJarlais, and everything I said then is just as true today, because DesJarlais has spent over a decade in Congress wrapping himself in the pro-life label like a shield. **But then there 's what he actually did.**
Actual **court documents** show that DesJarlais pressured a mistress to get an abortion. The same man who wants the federal government to make that decision for your family couldn't live by those convictions himself when it was inconvenient for him.
Let that sink in. This isn't about attacking someone's personal struggles. Lord knows my family has had enough of those. **This is about honesty.** This is about who gets to sit in that room with you.
**My wife and I didn 't have the luxury of hypocrisy. **We faced that impossible moment for real. And then we fought back, through IVF, through hope, through our son Killian, who is 18 months old and the strongest boy I know. Nobody handed us a rating. Nobody gave us an endorsement.
We just lived it, and we know thousands of families across the nation are living it too. **[If you could show support to my campaign by CLICKING HERE, you'll keep us fighting for the medical rights every person should have:](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ee6c2c1c-2e7b-476b-914c-922bddddc28e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Chip in Today, Anything Helps](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ee6c2c1c-2e7b-476b-914c-922bddddc28e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/72f5bd33-1d11-47fc-8257-95a785f27998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tennessee's 4th District deserves a representative whose convictions don't change depending on whether the cameras are on. Someone who has actually faced these moments and come out the other side believing, not performing, that families should make these decisions.
That's why I'm running. And that's why this race matters.
If you believe representation should be earned through lived experience and real conviction, not recycled talking points and hollow ratings, chip in $20 today and help us take this seat.
(If you are logged in to an active ActBlue account, the following buttons will automatically process your donation: )
[Donate $5](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/81f4203c-8bf4-4c1d-a1ce-6e1943e53a4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Donate $10](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7d05807e-29fb-4b51-b1e7-5a8d93c71547?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Donate $25](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b0cfb3b4-d5ff-4284-8f67-1d50c596e1a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Donate $50](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d9ff495f-13e4-4fab-ae5f-bc4b96950b25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Donate Other Amount!](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/27c67836-c51a-4298-97a5-899976e31911?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: Same story, same fight, different face. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Same story, same fight, different face. | | | May 18 | | | | | | | | | | My wife and I have lived through seven miscarriages. One of them came just months after the Dobbs decision. We were sitting in a doctor's office for a 10-week ultrasound when the doctor told us the fetus was forming without a head, there was no heartbeat, and could only helpbecause there was no heartbeat. | | ---|---|--- Some of you have followed this fight since I ran against Andy Ogles. The lines have changed, redistricting put us in a new district, but the fight hasn't. Different name on the door, same broken ideology inside. Now I'm running against Scott DesJarlais, and everything I said then is just as true today, because DesJarlais has spent over a decade in Congress wrapping himself in the pro-life label like a shield. But then there 's what he actually did. Actual court documents show that DesJarlais pressured a mistress to get an abortion. The same man who wants the federal government to make that decision for your family couldn't live by those convictions himself when it was inconvenient for him. Let that sink in. This isn't about attacking someone's personal struggles. Lord knows my family has had enough of those. This is about honesty. This is about who gets to sit in that room with you. My wife and I didn 't have the luxury of hypocrisy. We faced that impossible moment for real. And then we fought back, through IVF, through hope, through our son Killian, who is 18 months old and the strongest boy I know. Nobody handed us a rating. Nobody gave us an endorsement. We just lived it, and we know thousands of families across the nation are living it too. | | ---|---|--- Tennessee's 4th District deserves a representative whose convictions don't change depending on whether the cameras are on. Someone who has actually faced these moments and come out the other side believing, not performing, that families should make these decisions. That's why I'm running. And that's why this race matters. If you believe representation should be earned through lived experience and real conviction, not recycled talking points and hollow ratings, chip in $20 today and help us take this seat. (If you are logged in to an active ActBlue account, the following buttons will automatically process your donation: ) Mike Cortese is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell Mike Cortese that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | (C) 2026 Mike Cortese 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Harry Dunn
subject: This was a hard email to write....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| My pain and my trauma didn't end on January 7.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2266%2E259176%2Ez-24Y2) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2266%2E259176%2Ez-24Y2)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10889?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S7_C7_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2266%2E259176%2Ez-24Y2) Hey Peter, I'll be straight with you: I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally. I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, and those were tough some days. But the aftermath of the January 6th insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain and my trauma didn't end on January 7. Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest obstacles I've ever faced. But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6th committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy. And Peter, I've never looked back. [**I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you split a donation of just $10 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me hit my $50,000 daily goal?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10889?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S7_C7_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2266%2E259176%2Ez-24Y2) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Harry Dunn and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10890?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.17_Dunn-Straight_B5_F1_S7_C7_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2266%2E259176%2Ez-24Y2)

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

subject: This tells you everything you need to know
body:
| | “The money picture heading into November is not close; the RNC has roughly $120 million in cash on hand while the DNC is operating in the red.

“ _**We’ve been breaking all fundraising records**_. We’re working hard. We have Vice President Vance, who’s our Finance Chair, Chairman girders and myself. We spend a lot of time raising, raising the necessary funds that we can. Going into November, and then, of course, **President Trump is a great messenger**. And so we are sitting really well as a party. We’ve got about 120 million cash on hand. **And when you look at the Democrats, they are in the hole right now.** They are in debt. And so we feel very good about where we are positioned moving forward, going into November with our finances,” Crosbie added.

**With that kind of financial advantage and a strong candidate in Braun, the national party’s attention to Washington this cycle is not charity. Gluesenkamp Perez’s moderate act has worked twice against the wrong Republican with Joe Kent. Will her luck hold in this third contest?** ”
– _RNC co-chair is coming to Washington to back Braun - and she’s bringing $120 million worth of reasons Gluesenkamp Perez should be scared, SEATTLE RED_

Trump endorsement + massive outside spending + Democrats have no resources = HOW MAGA FINALLY DEFEATS MARIE

name: Team Rayfield
subject: Support Christina Stephenson for Labor Commissioner and Turn In Your Ballot by Tuesday
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/support-christina-stephenson-for-labor-commissioner-and-turn-in-your-ballot-by-tuesday?e=1768325bd4)
---
| |
---
| | Friends -

At a time when everything is getting more expensive, we need leaders that protect workers and fight to lower costs. _**That's why I'm supporting Christina Stephenson for Labor Commissioner.**_

Your ballot with her race on it is due Tuesday, May 19, and I'm asking you to join me in voting for her. I've watched Christina up close and she's an effective leader for working people. She's a mom, civil rights attorney, and former small business owner who took on a broken state agency and is fixing it, including returning more than $20 million to workers who had their wages stolen, clearing backlogs decades in the making, and passing bipartisan laws that protect kids and help small businesses.

This is a clear choice, and it's a race that will be decided on Tuesday. _**Please fill out your ballot today and drop it at any official ballot box by 8 PM Tuesday.**_

Find your nearest drop box at [https://dpo.org/i-will-vote/](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=5f3d0543e6&e=1768325bd4)

Thanks for voting!

subject: Could you guys please get out of my shot...

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41350%2E3422442%2ENiF7Fd)
Peter,
Here’s the reality in the California governor’s race:
With less than three weeks until the primary election, there’s a chance that **TWO** MAGA Republicans could end up on the general election ballot.
**We need a Democrat who stands out from the pack.** I’m not like most people running for governor. I'm a single mom of three kids who fills the gas tank and pushes the grocery cart just like almost everybody else in our state—and most of all, I can take accountability and laugh at myself too.
**That’s why we made this ad to cut through the noise and make sure voters across California hear what’s at stake.[You can check it out here:](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260517_3_ak.zqeMFe&refcode=em20260517-41350&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41350%2E3422442%2ENiF7Fd)**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260517_3_ak.zqeMFe&refcode=em20260517-41350&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41350%2E3422442%2ENiF7Fd)
I’m running to lower costs for working families and take on powerful interests that keep Californians stuck—but none of that matters if voters don’t hear our message before ballots are cast.
And right now, that means breaking through a flood of spending from corporate-funded candidates and a literal billionaire pouring money into this race.
With only weeks left until the primary, every day counts. I’m counting on supporters like you, Peter, to help us keep our message in front of voters when it matters most.
**[I’d be honored if you chipped in $5 today to help us reach as many Californians as possible before the primary.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260517_3_ak.zqeMFe&refcode=em20260517-41350&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41350%2E3422442%2ENiF7Fd)**

Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260517-41350&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=41350_3422442_NiF7Fd&akid=41350%2E3422442%2ENiF7Fd)**

name: Danielle Bethell for Governor
subject: Good News for Eastern Oregon and Rural Communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell
body:
Too often, decisions made in Washington ignore the people who actually live and work in these communities.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,This week, the Trump Administration rescinded the Biden-era "Conservation and Landscape Health Rule," commonly known as the Public Lands Rule.For many communities across eastern Oregon and rural parts of our state, this is welcome news.The Biden-era rule created serious concerns because it expanded the ability of federal agencies to restrict productive uses of public lands, including grazing, mining, energy development, and other activities that support rural economies and working families. The federal government has a responsibility to manage public lands responsibly, but it also has a responsibility to recognize that these lands are tied directly to the livelihoods of Oregonians.**Too often, decisions made in Washington ignore the people who actually live and work in these communities.** I've spent years working with local leaders, timber interests, agricultural communities, and federal partners on issues involving wildfire recovery, forest management, and economic development. I understand how deeply connected these issues are to jobs, community stability, recreation, water access, and long-term recovery in rural Oregon. [Can You Chip In Now?](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-y/) Conservation and economic activity are not mutually exclusive. Oregon can protect natural resources while still supporting the industries and communities that depend on access to public lands.What frustrated many Oregonians about the prior rule was the growing sense that local voices no longer mattered and that federal agencies were gaining more authority with less accountability.That approach does not work for Oregon.As Governor, I will continue pushing for balanced land management policies that respect rural communities, support responsible economic activity, and ensure that decisions affecting Oregon are not made without Oregon voices at the table.With Election Day almost here, this campaign continues building momentum across every part of the state, including communities that have felt ignored for far too long.If you believe Oregon needs leadership that understands both our natural resources and the people whose lives depend on them, [I'd be grateful for your support.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-j/)Thank you,**Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor****P.S.** Rural Oregon deserves a Governor who will fight to make sure local communities are heard instead of sidelined by federal bureaucracy. If you'd like to help us continue reaching voters across the state before May 19, [please chip in here today.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-t/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-i/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-d/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-h/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-k/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-m/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-li-auldyjd-hhlrhljhit-c/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-auldyjd-l-q)

clean_body: Too often, decisions made in Washington ignore the people who actually live and work in these communities. Friends,This week, the Trump Administration rescinded the Biden-era "Conservation and Landscape Health Rule," commonly known as the Public Lands Rule.For many communities across eastern Oregon and rural parts of our state, this is welcome news.The Biden-era rule created serious concerns because it expanded the ability of federal agencies to restrict productive uses of public lands, including grazing, mining, energy development, and other activities that support rural economies and working families. The federal government has a responsibility to manage public lands responsibly, but it also has a responsibility to recognize that these lands are tied directly to the livelihoods of Oregonians.Too often, decisions made in Washington ignore the people who actually live and work in these communities. I've spent years working with local leaders, timber interests, agricultural communities, and federal partners on issues involving wildfire recovery, forest management, and economic development. I understand how deeply connected these issues are to jobs, community stability, recreation, water access, and long-term recovery in rural Oregon. Conservation and economic activity are not mutually exclusive. Oregon can protect natural resources while still supporting the industries and communities that depend on access to public lands.What frustrated many Oregonians about the prior rule was the growing sense that local voices no longer mattered and that federal agencies were gaining more authority with less accountability.That approach does not work for Oregon.As Governor, I will continue pushing for balanced land management policies that respect rural communities, support responsible economic activity, and ensure that decisions affecting Oregon are not made without Oregon voices at the table.With Election Day almost here, this campaign continues building momentum across every part of the state, including communities that have felt ignored for far too long.If you believe Oregon needs leadership that understands both our natural resources and the people whose lives depend on them, you,Danielle Bethell Republican for GovernorP.S. Rural Oregon deserves a Governor who will fight to make sure local communities are heard instead of sidelined by federal bureaucracy. body:
Two U.S. Navy EA-18G Growler jets [collided midair](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAYBODT2B0WBmNwQfEad3ntlhaBH_NH2ERAwub2K-8Vth5pRt983babwYjn_t8coKtP2wmtRKgV8uZxDxXyA2qxKUZ0kKKDUp8bo2wmVJBRbc5g_GxT77QHYMB70KOUC12UFLwPWpnRyVmM3AmpZiWlkYKaSclpWe5whx711UbFqEZKhaADvxvJhV-UodJza7uJgsOa8vBIeNYAPn7SG_Jg09FHHWp9lo7_69jasbW1Nvj0fSmuvGPrq3RsrS2Ry0FsNiUQ98p47gSdCYkYzKSE1AgckHc47YfYDK2Q_CqBFAsn9Fm7Z8MYscyym-h-GIy_-_VPp701-wkAAP__PLODHQ) during an aerial demonstration at the Gunfighter Skies Air Show at Idaho's Mountain Home Air Force Base on Sunday afternoon. All four crew members ejected safely and were reported in stable condition.

# Monday, May 18, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1980, [Mount St. Helens erupted](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuhDAUAE9jOpA_gKFwkYZu06ZExn4Grx42wm9Be_toc4W0U8xI8_OYHzZiTOu33cFQyHOCuyAQwTmHuG4E5xOouIwYPWT0UOiYJZd9zbtaDLO3Ed9zW3kTACSoCozQeuTjoDtVbUYqGbge-rAEL2TXWhGkXrRwYvF98KqK5mPjnRgE513HG7VYrbowDpbroJxjLQcfKZ_NM8dEGwR85wvOxuW9QrMRHYWpLyYnJqf7vptXWUuz5ovJ6crobMpQmJz2_EpUF2rqDRDSBxUXITlgchLjwGtnyTp8lz26Gs7XQTGn6jT-uCNiLL1mLV93G_EvTf_6dRn5GwAA__-6YoCi) in southwestern Washington state in the most destructive volcanic event in U.S. history. The blast flattened 230 square miles of forest, killed 57 people, and dropped the mountain's summit by more than 1,300 feet. In our _Science_ section today, we've got the story of how art critics on X spent last week tearing apart [a "lousy" AI painting](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwRsRxibggaGLt3TtaN3Axb4pBhdo0rx9lb5C5yN9R_o_LssFKFJa32FH20JeEj5qxNawLIHWrWG5Yasux0gec_RY27FIIc9cKN6bxQPF5zJ23gZEiUOHttd6EpPRaug2q931LLwyyl0VTj0aY7wwbhDgpdJj6Mi-NKF60wuhlDgNV9CDCpMBocPgHBsFemq5nG6ZUtswxGe-Yzm5vHfRbq0dlQ1vTM5Mzgc2OOgH42tlcn7ZTM5CMTn3I5NzzTvmhLxuUNBz4AUh8j0nbPwASo3SyqFyIA7Jc6if6HnIhbtCjb6-sTI5d8X640ExUj1rNop1B_p77Nq_It6t_A0AAP__IzCGBQ), only to learn they'd been roasting a real Monet. Today's sponsor is [Cozy Earth](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuKyEQANDTQOfVAIvZLSh-4184TpsSYRi8Y2GzYkd2nNNHyRVygSe9j1M4Rap0v7zHG3ouLdzxuVVkxh4KXRbGfkXeUquVMraaceM1aND7HdidmkKOVF9hlNkXRI1GolfOzTBPzhq5-FxGmKOxykAs55gmUBGs3ruMScN8luR_NLBqUgDWwmDO0Rlb5imCKyYlMQJm4taHa6M7L1jqqz2wD6ndZPUL87oJ80_og9CH1L5eGDsvw_pZBmpCH97g-P94kt3n9Um10rZ3YoTLLVL9JfhP74fX3wEAAP__kr5r-Q). If you've been thinking about upgrading your sleep setup, this is one of the best times to do it. Their Memorial Day Sale starts TODAY, and _The Flyover_ readers can now [use code FLYOVER for 30% off](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuKyEQANDTQOfVAIvZLSh-4184TpsSYRi8Y2GzYkd2nNNHyRVygSe9j1M4Rap0v7zHG3ouLdzxuVVkxh4KXRbGfkXeUquVMraaceM1aND7HdidmkKOVF9hlNkXRI1GolfOzTBPzhq5-FxGmKOxykAs55gmUBGs3ruMScN8luR_NLBqUgDWwmDO0Rlb5imCKyYlMQJm4taHa6M7L1jqqz2wD6ndZPUL87oJ80_og9CH1L5eGDsvw_pZBmpCH97g-P94kt3n9Um10rZ3YoTLLVL9JfhP74fX3wEAAP__kr5r-Q). Their bamboo sheets remain one of the most talked-about home upgrades we've featured.

## Navy Jets Collide at Idaho Air Show
Two U.S. Navy EA-18G Growler jets [collided midair](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAYBODT2B0WBmNwQfEad3ntlhaBH_NH2ERAwub2K-8Vth5pRt983babwYjn_t8coKtP2wmtRKgV8uZxDxXyA2qxKUZ0kKKDUp8bo2wmVJBRbc5g_GxT77QHYMB70KOUC12UFLwPWpnRyVmM3AmpZiWlkYKaSclpWe5whx711UbFqEZKhaADvxvJhV-UodJza7uJgsOa8vBIeNYAPn7SG_Jg09FHHWp9lo7_69jasbW1Nvj0fSmuvGPrq3RsrS2Ry0FsNiUQ98p47gSdCYkYzKSE1AgckHc47YfYDK2Q_CqBFAsn9Fm7Z8MYscyym-h-GIy_-_VPp701-wkAAP__PLODHQ) during an aerial demonstration at the Gunfighter Skies Air Show at Idaho's Mountain Home Air Force Base on Sunday afternoon. All four crew members ejected and were being evaluated by medical personnel. Video shared by spectators shows the two electronic warfare jets flying close together before locking together in midair, pitching upward, and cartwheeling to the ground as four parachutes deploy. The aircraft exploded on impact about two miles northwest of the base. [Watch the video here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Ltu6kAQxvGnWXeg8V7tYgvOQY5SkBalsgbv2F60vsg7QHj7CF4h7Vd8-ul_PrUnjCnOwxdO5Llf2pkeOREzbW0fh5FpuxLnbkkpBlpSoMxrK0HaHZhdWbUBY3q2ugi-J5KkCvKlczXUlTOqGD1ip7UsgzWoS3tRqqpdXSuLhCZckIroX29gyqoEMAb26oJOmb6uEFyvuk5ooBB52fbXJc48Up-ey522fbdMRfIj85qFOgjZCNn8vFYhmzd43m7DIGSTGfmWhWwkGAu1stKAddqAhlKoJgt11FZIi9Mq1D8W6uiqzxn-3-fV0Ydbz9_H2HbmUGw-rI-YUszWCQ3DhDG9GfyndncvfwMAAP__gL5-cA). The jets were part of the [Navy's Growler Demonstration Team](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyhCAURb8GO3eeCIIFRRq7TZvSeQsPZcOKA2Qd_z5jfiHVbe7cO-d83ec7hhi25RNfZKpP80ZHiVQr5dmHZa2Un1SLTTEGRyk6KnWfOfChBdl2enYY4jmLxhlPxKlvyHRKjTBqJftmNQ-rpcJRd-KBfrQgtJAghR3kAJ4PXRPMtQay0x2AlHDrH6h66UeNoHxvLRNALtSUb88UtrqSj2d6U77Z9GqiWWvdC-s_GJ8YnyqWb9zc_pP3VOiqMD5dTFfg-2yXnI5IubQ2Y1lbDLms6WB8arJx-xFiDGVQTMDywhD_Puq_xLwN_w0AAP__ViZ4dg), based at Naval Air Station Whidbey Island in Washington state. The base was [briefly locked down](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAUhZ_G7rAwP7YpKLZxl223tDBc4pvFEAETlLcfOZo3mO5I5-rT_c6_23YzGDDe_5oTdPVpi9BKgFohbx7vR4X8gFpsCgEdpOCg1OfGKJsIlWRcNmcwvDfRO-0BGPAe9DjPiqpllrw_NAjvJkot9UYwJ8RuZmX5OHE1TVwp6FFfNCrHZaRUSjrw3cxcerUYOntubScoOKwpD4-EsR7gwzu9IA82nX3QR63P0vE_HVs7trbWhrjby-LqO7ZesWPrVyE_6URnMJMHVPLRKpgi8SlbKCQk-9-lFgk6cyRy3X0aspsCpBypkWyj4ULKZeqzds-GF2KaO0Hvp8Hw-ar-asqXZt8BAAD__7pSiik), and the rest of the show was canceled. It was the first Gunfighter Skies event in eight years.
## Grads Boo AI Talk at Commencements
Graduating students at multiple universities have spent the past week [booing commencement speakers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp8GOyYIIlhQbGP3b7ulQbjonSAYvTMT337jvMJfn-Tk-86_n-nHY8ay_PUbOEp1KvA5MxDBMSVcVoLjCXSGmjNGqDnCSfskhey50Ly1U_SYr6lroksAElQDrjVmEIM1WjWrAyOCmK2CoO0g42zn3htlVNf7FKWVDbrbJnRrWyG0Fg81e6N0GqwXJqkQWCcgItXj8axYaIWUr_qG4xHq1mS3Eu0nU3-YHJkcCcIajlcJ642ZHG85k6PQTI6tYXLExK_6OoAv-MaycM9D3TYoATYoxM8dIKwcC_-e3Pw1A4-1EL8x1sI9Mjk2h4v7B3PGszesE8vmMX8X0a8yvp38HwAA___ajYX5) who tried to celebrate artificial intelligence. At the University of Central Florida, real estate executive Gloria Caulfield was interrupted by jeers when she called AI "the next industrial revolution." Stunned, she turned to the other speakers on stage and asked, _"What happened?"_ Former [Google CEO Eric Schmidt](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQhU9jMrf8gxsIHGxCNptuiNx2ATWyKWTXznTv6Vf0FSZ9T_rez5-P5SNgxmP7HQp4Xmk54LtlYIa6rLjtDPUTuEXKGRNQTtD4XIwyd6mc1OOSAubX0nfJrwAGbAdeD8OkpnFwttu9Ng-tJtuvNo0AvZ7AJmeSHu0dHFjTob9oyulRK-WcutlHGKxbpzGoYbUxil5BQqZ6-yQ8eIc1v-gL6i1S6bLfmc8m7C9hZmHm43VS48sSZr7AwszKCTPrQZj5b5PXPmFmeMqNaMsgI5CEilG2uBdMLB9EkGRgGSr-oyPISKXAEaHAwfJKlgFlg6fcQw2tveWYA5YL3FWfzm_MGdt9EL3aSsD8rso_-vfLm_8BAAD__2bhj88) got an even rougher reception at the University of Arizona on Saturday, where boos grew loud enough to drown him out when he told graduates they would "help shape artificial intelligence." The pushback reflects growing anxiety about AI's impact on the entry-level job market, with critics warning the technology could obliterate opportunities for new graduates. A recent [Gallup poll](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGunDAQheGnMZ3RYK-xKVykobtpU6LBHsCbASPsuxvePtq8QuojHX36f31NX5g4HetP3MnXJU8HvQtTrXRNS1q3SteTagmZOUXKHKnUc1KgeglGdm6KmPieHk30C5Ei3ZDvrB1gcNboZvNGzzYYMKCDi2i63mkzL4SDnuegwDbJf97AdK4DMAZaPaPVZhkcgl10COIBFFPNV_vM6agbLXznF11tyHvDfqv1LEL_EGoUavzw2xWZv8_PLtR4ZmahRgvO9SDUeOfvY5W405UCHkU-8yx3vH5TlSeVkvZUdlkqHrHIlfOMzHeL5fzTXD6e78ScSm_FA9YdE_9D1P8q9_LqbwAAAP__hZ6EOw) found only 43% of Americans aged 15 to 34 think it's a good time to find a job locally, down from 75% in 2022.
## Oldest English Poem Found in Roman Library
Researchers from Trinity College Dublin have identified a 9th-century manuscript in Rome's national library as [the third-oldest surviving copy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL_GzhhhMAYCgksm20svtBhoxr1qg4X7duW_P_l-YcNSSaV678_H-hGRsL5_xx0Cl7ZW-D4JmKGvBd8bQ_8EPlMjwgyNMpx8rEqqRUgjJrfmiHSt85hDAVCgRwiTtV56Z40et_CCnJOJJiULVmvjXJoVFJ1VnozTfsRwr0kzuUlKY-RDv6LVpngXpS06pWGWkJFbf3w2rLxBoat9QX-kto8UNubjHPSvQT0H9YzHDXBXd-iMiWBQz0ZZQH0TnpvYY_17po4Hi6MB90u8IINIEfLeqtiuvQqKjFUgR7rEJBe7-CSn2cspFblkF83itM9micnLsYd8fCMRnosdZvneI9L_c_wjo19B_QsAAP__R2mK0w) of _Caedmon's Hymn_ , widely considered the first poem written in English. Dated to between 800 and 830, it's the oldest known version where Old English appears in the main body of the text, rather than [scrawled in the margins](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OgzAQBeDTmC7IPzgDhYtt6LLtlshrj4OjAUf2KCi3X5ErbDfF6H1P7-e23HymvN-__YaOU1l2PBohM9Yl5fvKWB_ILRSiHLFQxMbPRUt9vUh7UeMSfab3MnTRJUSNpkOnACY5jWBNt7o0QJSg_AQDor3CFOKo_JgUakheQ5fdmSatGpWU1sre_HowNk2jl5BMCGKQGDOX2j9K3nnFRO_ywtqHsnXkVuZnE-ZL6Fno-TiOvoWMe8BPs_NJ6LkioW_YhJ5PTehZ2vM-XauNMQb6lbeuuvg8MlFuVxCDvG8-08fhf43zcvovAAD__-bhdhs). The nine-line hymn praises God for creating the world and is said to have been composed in the 7th century by Caedmon, an illiterate Northumbrian cowherd who, according to legend, was given the gift of song in a dream and sang the verses on the spot. The book was transcribed in a northern Italian abbey, then had vanished for centuries, and passed through European collectors and a New York rare-book dealer before Italy bought it back in 1972. [Read the poem here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGuozAQgOHTQAcaTIyhcLENXbbdEjl4jCcabGTPJsrtn967wrvA_0vfv_t2d8SUjr_uRCshbwnflVEEyxboiILliVL3zEweM3uscm0K1NSB7oZ58474s91abwOiwrFFOxizwDIbPbbRAgCExwzoJq_NAFrBODm1BGWUWXZsyX7XQA_zAKA19OPDmVGHZXZgwrjvzQ3Qk-TSPzMliRj4k19Y-j2fLdsoctVm_NOotVErne7AZ_5fkuM-l6NRqytCO2Oj1t2hP3OqXfycqZOIXaBSpcN0MNXYXRmlLdZfb2KmOpnmBsfpiH9W8iufl1VfAQAA__-bP3sp).
* * *
Love reading _The Flyover_? **BIG ANNOUNCEMENT: **Meet _Flyover Updates_

By the time you finish reading this morning's edition of _The Flyover_ , the world has kept on moving.

clean_body: Two U.S. Navy EA-18G Growler jets during an aerial demonstration at the Gunfighter Skies Air Show at Idaho's Mountain Home Air Force Base on Sunday afternoon. All four crew members ejected safely and were reported in stable condition. | | | | | | Monday, May 18, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1980, in southwestern Washington state in the most destructive volcanic event in U.S. history. The blast flattened 230 square miles of forest, killed 57 people, and dropped the mountain's summit by more than 1,300 feet. In our Science section today, we've got the story of how art critics on X spent last week tearing apart , only to learn they'd been roasting a real Monet. Today's sponsor is . If you've been thinking about upgrading your sleep setup, this is one of the best times to do it. Their Memorial Day Sale starts TODAY, and The Flyover readers can now . Their bamboo sheets remain one of the most talked-about home upgrades we've featured. | Navy Jets Collide at Idaho Air Show Two U.S. Navy EA-18G Growler jets during an aerial demonstration at the Gunfighter Skies Air Show at Idaho's Mountain Home Air Force Base on Sunday afternoon. All four crew members ejected and were being evaluated by medical personnel. Video shared by spectators shows the two electronic warfare jets flying close together before locking together in midair, pitching upward, and cartwheeling to the ground as four parachutes deploy. The aircraft exploded on impact about two miles northwest of the base. . The jets were part of the , based at Naval Air Station Whidbey Island in Washington state. The base was , and the rest of the show was canceled. It was the first Gunfighter Skies event in eight years. Grads Boo AI Talk at Commencements Graduating students at multiple universities have spent the past week who tried to celebrate artificial intelligence. At the University of Central Florida, real estate executive Gloria Caulfield was interrupted by jeers when she called AI "the next industrial revolution." Stunned, she turned to the other speakers on stage and asked, "What happened?" Former got an even rougher reception at the University of Arizona on Saturday, where boos grew loud enough to drown him out when he told graduates they would "help shape artificial intelligence." The pushback reflects growing anxiety about AI's impact on the entry-level job market, with critics warning the technology could obliterate opportunities for new graduates. A recent found only 43% of Americans aged 15 to 34 think it's a good time to find a job locally, down from 75% in 2022. Oldest English Poem Found in Roman Library Researchers from Trinity College Dublin have identified a 9th-century manuscript in Rome's national library as of Caedmon's Hymn , widely considered the first poem written in English. Dated to between 800 and 830, it's the oldest known version where Old English appears in the main body of the text, rather than . The nine-line hymn praises God for creating the world and is said to have been composed in the 7th century by Caedmon, an illiterate Northumbrian cowherd who, according to legend, was given the gift of song in a dream and sang the verses on the spot. The book was transcribed in a northern Italian abbey, then had vanished for centuries, and passed through European collectors and a New York rare-book dealer before Italy bought it back in 1972. . # **The 2026 "Trump Effect"
on IRAs over $50,000**
---
**President Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” is exactly what this country needs.** It’s big, it’s bold, and it’s finally putting American families first. But we have to be honest with you about something that’s hard to say. **Trump’s new plan is moving fast** ... maybe too fast for the old, fragile banking system to handle. Think of it like a powerful cleaning crew coming into a dusty old house. They are going to scrub everything clean, which is wonderful. But if you have fragile family heirlooms sitting out on shaky tables... they might get knocked over in the excitement. It’s not Trump’s fault. He is doing his job. **But the Wall Street banks holding your retirement savings are like those shaky tables.** They are old, tired, and not built for this kind of _**Economic Revolution**._ If you leave your money sitting there, it could get caught in the shake-up.
---
**This is why we hesitate to share this next part publicly.**
---
There is a way to move your **_financial heirloom_** to a safe room before the cleaning starts. It involves a specific, IRS-approved loophole that very few families know about. **To be honest, this loophole works so well it may feel a little unfair**. It allows you to quietly step out of the chaotic banking system to figuratively _**lock** _your savings into something that doesn't care about stock markets or bank failures. It can create a level of peace and quiet that most retirees never get to feel. While your neighbors are glued to the TV worrying about the next market swing, you can turn the TV off, knowing your grandkid's inheritance is sitting in a sanctuary that Wall Street can't touch.
---
# **[We’ve written down exactly how to use this loophole inside our 2026 Patriot’s Wealth Defense Guide.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
This kind of protection is typically only whispered about by the ultra-wealthy. But with the speed of Trump's changes, we feel a moral duty to share it with those who need to help protect their families. **If you are an American Citizen with more than $50,000 in retirement, you may already be eligible to receive the benefits detailed in this free guide.** [**Note: We also currently have a Silver Allocation Incentive*.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Qualified accounts may be eligible for up to $10,000 in additional physical silver to jumpstart the hedge.

body:
I wanted to personally reach out as we head into Election Day.

| | | | |
---
| | Friends,
I wanted to personally reach out as we head into Election Day.The last several months have been an incredible journey - traveling across Kentucky, meeting voters in every corner of the Commonwealth, and building a campaign centered on the people of this state. I’ve had the privilege of seeing firsthand the energy, support, and belief so many Kentuckians have in Daniel Cameron and his vision for Kentucky.
As we close out this primary campaign, I’d love to invite you to join us on Election Night as we gather with friends, supporters, and members of our campaign team to watch the results come in together.
**Daniel Cameron Election Night Watch Party****Tuesday, May 19th****6:00 PM****Chapel 1888****108 W. Jefferson****La Grange, KY 40031**
Campaigns are built by people who show up: those who volunteer, pray, encourage, bring friends, and help spread the word. Whether you’ve been with us from day one or joined along the way, _we’d love to have you with us for this special evening_.
I hope you’ll join Daniel, Makenze, our team, and supporters from across Kentucky as we finish this race together.
Thank you for all you’ve done.
Sincerely,Nathanael HirtCampaign ManagerDaniel Cameron for U.S. Senate
---

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1931, Texas lawmakers established a five-member committee to [investigate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGyoyAUxvGnwU4HzkWEgmIbu2y7pXMMR2UGJQMnMb79TvIKt_pX36_4_t2mG8YUj_Uv7uT5veTpoLMmYqYyLbnsVOKxI9NaMDyRqdb85AkkmFb2rbJTwJiuSTfBzzI41ZBXw-CUBKVNs3mNup-d6-8OQDo9W3QalKVAM1rTmyb6DyZ7ZZWSAKazRvXyZ1ic0VbfcRFaUoicS8cbMb2xLunKLyrdPe9N8hvzo4qfPwJGAeN5nh3XDfOR4kFdLquA8btqA17tfH0iYKSDy6dOQ1N8eJwxpVjNILRcd4zpi_PvLnl5-B8AAP__SoF1TQ) all aspects of state government, aiming to streamline operations and cut costs. The legislature never acted on the committee's recommendations, which would have saved an estimated $6 million a year. Today is the first day of early voting for the Republican and Democratic [runoff elections](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2ypCAUhJ9GMyz-BA0INjG7m25onZGDUoVAAY4zb7818wo37-7q7_v3s_6ADz7uf-FE014urRHvGrA1LKtL5cTi4wkN9wL2goa1pqutnHJF6EjYtFrw4b3K3poHtTPr0TCtZ0Y5k6o_jBP8IdSoNJfzQ6ppo8iFFWKjWrvZ0t6bzxgd2cQY5VwNk2IjFdrNSk5yA9dJita3VIZ2YMMXVBfe6Yll2NLZB3O0lmsn_nR86fhy3_fg0kvDVZuPn0jHlw9Tx5dvmZQrJufIBmcGv8dKcsEMBYnzEQLJVz0IQglv8kzNx51AziXBdmDti7H59iH4qnQn6X6CD98b7Xfynob_DwAA__-vG4ab). Are you planning to vote early? Hit reply to let us know. Today's sponsor, [Fisher Investments](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OwyAQRk-Du0QzA8ZOQbFSlC7bbmlhMyRI2EQw-bv9KnuFrb_vveL9nKezTzltl2-_spNXLNPGz5ZZhOsUS125pm31wpfqw90Lt1buMhGQ3UG_w3EKPuX3ZLrgZggH7NjhMBwQCI3trs5iBB1oIB1xGUMMo4HeRDPPFnimuUvuI4MeR0QgsvvRYg96iAdrRrP4qAxwSFLqXq4s_PIt5nd5cN0vZe2yu4rcmtJfik6KTjde58xStpg2vy3J58_ts-mTV_qIZgBFdlH6SES9UWQbKn3sqgu3Z8o5NTsoA5fVpz-0k_91eTj6DQAA__-I-3QN), is helping you plan your ideal retirement with a free guide designed to align your goals, timeline, and investment strategy for lasting financial confidence.

## Abbott Proposes Statewide Prosecutor
Gov. Greg Abbott [unveiled proposals](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOpCAUBeCn0Q4DCIIFxTZ2s-2W5ipXhw2KgavOvP3GfYW_Pzkn3_nzGl8QYtjX37Cho8-Sxh3vEpEI87ikvGEO-waEawZ_AmEp6aRRctkxrpmwo4cQv6OqvZu470WNThjTCy6F6uq308q2HGDqfTe1QrXWKm1sL7TQ2syir4N7yrgWVgguZdfYTmjemqXvlFUzLJXi6AOl3NAbCT9QlvhNF-ZmTlsd3ZvoKFX7q5JDJYf7vpslfQychcL-RCo5PKZKDmu6GExTImLnfmGIhe14sxgKsb-nD3OAyDI-bHbkdKQCsdTZ-eMOMYbSmUrxdYMQ_0_Tzw67nPwXAAD__9JqgXI) to establish a statewide prosecutor and impeach "rogue" district attorneys during an event at the Austin Police Association's headquarters last week. He also renewed his call for legislation to deny bail to illegal immigrants accused of violent felonies. Travis County District Attorney Jose Garza, whom Abbott and local police have characterized as being soft on crime, [defended his work](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE8DmZHtMT8TONiEbDbdEDV2A601GNnNMNz-ibnCS6tUn6rq32t4AQXa5r-wouXPFIcNzxyQGdMwxbRiom0FxjmBP4Ax53jwoKVuhKyF6gYPFK7BlN6O0j9ViVa17VNJrUxTLlaath1BStf6BsDLrkM5mtr5UXZo0Jdkb5isVaeU1LqpukbV8tFOz8Z0xsFUGImeOKaKF2T8QJ7CFd-YKhfXMtiFec_F40-h-0L353lW_z-w3Wah-3tNoftvTOwxEJO7BRjHyCzyAgmz2PAU-zEGciLDhHwJmHHzIGjdEdwiUpwPFJ4yJ3IsgDmmDa-bVCbr95NCoNy0hZHzChS-1fh3h76t_gkAAP__XcmOZQ) to reduce the backlog of criminal cases without an indictment and dismissed Thursday's event as "a political stunt and a distraction from the governor's litany of failures." Abbott said a statewide prosecutor could bring indictments in criminal cases if local district attorneys haven't charged a suspect within the 90-day deadline. He also [highlighted](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2yozAQhE8jMrmksfhxQLAJ2dt0Q2okDWZqBXJJw-P59lv4Cpt399fdf77mL-TE-_M3bjTKz5Lnnc6aSITKvOSyUeF9Q6FnwXigUK35kBkMdNq02g5zRE7v2TVx9CY-bEOj7fuHNWBd16xjh8O9J1hacuhb70N8OIzGQRut8SY2PF5hprWDtQaguw2dbc29Xx6dG1zARTlDkSWXm6wk9IN1Se_8TeUW8takcRV5VXX_pWBSMJ3neQuJw19Y81El75dKwXTNUjB9_Aqmi6lgMq2CyToFE3qfRap-HT5x0BUXkrc-ua46cRXNe0hHpKqroNDJkfSr5ErhkFz0lgtpj5x0oSqFg3DeL05Txvg6OSWuXa-ceW7I6VNc_u_u7xH-BQAA__8Z0JdZ) two failed petitions to remove Garza from office. Authorizing the impeachment of district attorneys--and the denial of bail to illegal immigrants accused of violent crimes--would require [passing](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ_GZB61e8xfQHCJs730QtQMbcaSwchuhuXtT-wrbNRqqVRfVf37Gr8oxLAtf2nlQb59Gjc-S2QRzqNPeeUctpWEl0zzQcKlpENGBGw01Np040whXqOt5mGCuTcVD6ZtewNobFO9B_Te82QYsa7rJz7BMrWT8bbrugkQqjDcZlCbzhhAbB5dY2p4tr5vbGdf5JUFnoOk_JA3C39T8fFKH86PV1qrOLxF9qKefxQ6he48z8dRSNJM1y1Q6IqkfCl0d7P7kIS0KXQ3V6GDWqEzVqFbMi-apimJ6GP7cIhFW72nsIn-Aev9mGJ46UKe5dJ7pE37lDUCtgpdD9BB3TcA91flYd7PEGMoTassLCuF-JNZfrf0Z8D_AQAA__8quo_z) constitutional amendments, which must be approved by two-thirds of the members in the Texas House and Senate.
## El Paso Native Accused of Spying for Iran
The FBI is [offering](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk9jd0SAHWIXFNuk-7fd0prAkIyEwRrGcXz7VfYKW3_Sp_fen5_lByhTef6GFb18Ul0KHi2jCPKSKq_IVFYQfDLEHQRbq7ssVlun9FWZaYlA-VzGPvqHjrPp0ZvbbTbamtH1L5_s7LQZkoXHcJ0QDEYLKQ3BzsEE7Xry3zN9NZMx2lp3mZy56uGWZjdOY4DUjRojSeWLvFDwAy3ls76RL6GuffYvka11w6_O3jt7P47jkurna_HdO3vfW2fvQKxS5YCKimBWbxQFOeMTYz5V24ghY1TEUJQgc2W1l4h8VM5RCa2YqaCKGJBEvfYiqm2nanvbMEjPPm4H5UzN3bpRP1eg_A9P_i_q29u_AQAA___mM5Ct) a $200,000 reward for information that leads to the arrest and prosecution of Monica Witt, a former U.S. Air Force intelligence specialist believed to have defected to Iran. Witt, 47, was born in El Paso and enlisted in the Air Force at the age of 18. Witt was assigned to an RC-135 reconnaissance airplane crew before studying Farsi at the U.S. Defense Language Institute in Monterey, California. She [received access](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upSAUhZ8GO04A5ceCYhq7O-2UBmWjO0ExsM_1nrefOK8w7Vor60u-P1_zV8CM5_Y7HODpJ5X5hLtlIII6p1IPqHgegWCrIb4DQWvlTbMSynChuXRzDJg_89BFv4g4yg68tHaUQsnBdLvXyrregRPGuiUmo62GJY1idVYkoZYO_XMmtHRSCqXMyxmpRW_TaAY3rCGxQUBEKvVFOxD8hJbyp3xDfa3l6LLfia7G-l9MTUxNtMOOOT8dU9NVMq4fpqYzEJYzZN5gfVekJ9POiV73_CgnroHfSMSxhpNDu57xBjxg5anUFXhakFe4Q41MTV318boxZ2zGskFsR8B_yI7-T-K3V38DAAD__-hmhz4) to classified information and deployed to several locations in the Middle East before leaving the Air Force in 2008. In 2012, Witt attended the anti-Western International Conference on Hollywoodism in Tehran, where she allegedly disclosed military intelligence with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. During the event, she made remarks critical of the U.S. government and publicly converted to Islam. Witt is accused of sharing the names of American assets with Iranian officials and assisting hackers who were [developing and deploying malware](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uqzAQhJ_GdCB7MX-Fi9vQ5banRIu9DpaMjcwmJG9_lLzC6Ucz830_t-WGIYZ0_487GX75vCS6zkjMVBafy04lpB2Z7gXdA5nOMz94AQl9LbtajYvDEN-LrpxZpZtURUYNw6QkKN1Xm2nbbqAVrB28xtFZP3WT1YhuwnXq3FAF8ymTnRqVkgB9M_aqk-3gp16P2qIXWpILnEvDGzG98PTxnZ9UGpv3KpqN-ThF-0_ALGC-rqvZ3ycmTJxTyJ-QgPlDJWCO2WIUMGPhYCMJmPecgsX6Csy1X0N9YWJy9XenBoBeSSWbYzuqYtxxhRjD2Q9Cy_uOIX4v8N_EPQ38BgAA___qJYPB) against her former colleagues. In 2019, she was indicted, along with four others, for her participation in the scheme.
## Former Federal Inmate Graduates from SMU
Chris Young, a Tennessee native in his late 30s who was previously sentenced to life in prison for selling drugs, [graduated](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdKAZY4wpXLyGLq_dEjlhDJYMjuwhJH-_YrV_sN0tro50ztdturkQw778dxtZfvs07XSWSMyUJ5_yRjnsm2NaspsPx1RKOniSIHUNXY1mml2In0lVs73DPGBFFvt-QJCodLVaPQygwAzUtyTBd3fX4t0jIHiDppdVsBcMOjSIIKVujMYO2t4PWhn1cF4ooDlwyg2vxPR2xcdPelFuHmmrol2Zn0W0_4QchRzP82x8eqtL4zoIOV5TyPGx5lDqTzr2pS7bUf8ahbRX2c7PM8QYiu6FgmVzIf7Q-W9NXlZ-BwAA___G53Z8) this weekend from Southern Methodist University with degrees in public policy and economics. Young grew up in poverty and was sentenced in 2014 under mandatory "three strikes" federal sentencing guidelines. Moved by Young's 45-minute statement at sentencing, U.S. District Court Judge Kevin Sharp [stepped down](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGStCAUBODTYKYFqAgBwZ-YzZ9uaD3hOUMVyBQ8x5nbb7m1N9gLdPfXX7flBiGG_f4fElp6b3nZ8awRibAsWy4JS9gTEN4L-AMIa80HLZJL1fKxFXrxEOJnGRpvV-6NaNCKaTKCSzGo5mEdTGZ1Xq3aCEQxanA918rg6MS49qYJ9grjo9BCcClVp5UYeT9tRg16cLCxgaMPlEtHDyR8Q93iJ7-wdC6nJtoH0bOy_h-TM5PzeZ5dTUeH_mByvjBMzvEaTkzOW8mpDbuD4rAAhby3lNtfW8h7U6x_niHGUNXEBn5PEOJPD_3tnZeV3wEAAP__bkR7FA) two years later in protest of the standard. Sharp advocated for Young's release along with Dallas attorney Brittany Barnett and celebrity Kim Kardashian, and in 2021, President Trump granted Young clemency. "_Your past is not to hinder you, it is to propel you, and the future is not to scare you, it is to motivate you_ ," [Young said](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAYBODT4M4W_MaAC4rX0OW1W1rY_CRI2ERAQnL7lTfaE2w90oy--bosFxtiOK7_7Y66vnxaDmwlYq2YF5_yjjkcu614zdY9bMVS0qMuQEH0dOqZWpwN8b3wzumVupl1qJmUM6PAuOhuelNWKaTrDGwWfAJn5UhXz0fJ0cuNdUGfZXRiijEKIAYl2ERH6WfBFd-sJ5yiCzXlod6w4ssWH9_piXnY0t5Ffav1Xsj4j4AhYFprw7FuzrczJmBODwET02YjAfMx9R9UX_ZH_ysjYDgFriQjYLqs3b2FGEMRknB63W2IP4P1bzc9NXwHAAD__2h6e3Q). On this day in 1931, Texas lawmakers established a five-member committee to all aspects of state government, aiming to streamline operations and cut costs. Greg Abbott to establish a statewide prosecutor and impeach "rogue" district attorneys during an event at the Austin Police Association's headquarters last week. He also renewed his call for legislation to deny bail to illegal immigrants accused of violent felonies. Travis County District Attorney Jose Garza, whom Abbott and local police have characterized as being soft on crime, to reduce the backlog of criminal cases without an indictment and dismissed Thursday's event as "a political stunt and a distraction from the governor's litany of failures." Abbott said a statewide prosecutor could bring indictments in criminal cases if local district attorneys haven't charged a suspect within the 90-day deadline. He also two failed petitions to remove Garza from office. Authorizing the impeachment of district attorneys--and the denial of bail to illegal immigrants accused of violent crimes--would require constitutional amendments, which must be approved by two-thirds of the members in the Texas House and Senate. El Paso Native Accused of Spying for Iran The FBI is a $200,000 reward for information that leads to the arrest and prosecution of Monica Witt, a former U.S. Air Force intelligence specialist believed to have defected to Iran. Witt, 47, was born in El Paso and enlisted in the Air Force at the age of 18. Witt was assigned to an RC-135 reconnaissance airplane crew before studying Farsi at the U.S. Defense Language Institute in Monterey, California. She to classified information and deployed to several locations in the Middle East before leaving the Air Force in 2008. In 2012, Witt attended the anti-Western International Conference on Hollywoodism in Tehran, where she allegedly disclosed military intelligence with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. During the event, she made remarks critical of the U.S. government and publicly converted to Islam. Witt is accused of sharing the names of American assets with Iranian officials and assisting hackers who were against her former colleagues. In 2019, she was indicted, along with four others, for her participation in the scheme. subject: Portland Fire Department Marks National EMS Week, Honoring First Responders and Pre-Hospital Care Providers
body:

PORTLAND, Maine – The Portland Fire Department is celebrating National Emergency Medical Services Week from May 17 through May 23, joining departments and agencies across the country in recognizing the lifesaving work of EMTs, paramedics, 911 dispatchers, and other pre-hospital care providers.
